input.command:
# limit must be <= 100! Our code uses limit:200 which returns an error!
# That's why relayCurrencies is empty - the API call fails with 400
curl -s -X POST "https://api.relay.link/currencies/v2" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"chainIds":[8453],"defaultList":true,"limit":100}' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print(f'Total: {len(d)}')
for c in d[:5]:
    print(c.get('symbol'), c.get('address')[:30])
"
